summary: Iteration 174: Document formatting overhaul verification complete. All 11 backend tests pass. Fixed missing route for /cases/:caseId/barrister-view in App.js. All PDF and DOCX exports return HTTP 200. Frontend report views render with Times New Roman font.
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 document export tests pass (PDF and DOCX for quick_summary, full_detailed, barrister-view)
PDF exports use Times-Roman/Times-Bold fonts with 12pt body, 18pt headers, 14pt subheaders
DOCX exports use Times New Roman 12pt body, Heading 1 18pt bold with page_break_before, Heading 2 14pt bold
On-screen report view uses .legal-report class with Times New Roman 12pt body, h2 18pt bold, h3 14pt bold
Barrister View now accessible at /cases/:caseId/barrister-view (route was missing, now fixed)
1173 elements on Barrister View page use Times New Roman font
Export buttons (PDF, DOCX, Print) visible and functional on both ReportView and BarristerView
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 174 verified document formatting overhaul. Key findings: (1) All PDF/DOCX exports return HTTP 200 for quick_summary (rpt_0f71b9abfacd), full_detailed (rpt_2f3effb97c84), and barrister-view, (2) Fixed missing route /cases/:caseId/barrister-view in App.js, (3) On-screen reports use Times New Roman font with proper heading sizes (18pt h2, 14pt h3), (4) Export buttons visible on all report views, (5) Test case: case_6cc234434cbd (NSW homicide 'Homann').

frontend.report_view_export_buttons: PASS - PDF, DOCX, Print buttons visible
frontend.barrister_view_loads: PASS - Barrister Brief renders with 15 sections
frontend.barrister_view_times_new_roman: PASS - 1173 elements with Times New Roman
frontend.barrister_view_export_buttons: PASS - PDF, DOCX, Print, Acceptance Pack, Quick Brief buttons visible

bug_fix_applied.issue: Route /cases/:caseId/barrister-view was not defined in App.js
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added new Route for /cases/:caseId/barrister-view pointing to BarristerView component
bug_fix_applied.verification: Barrister View now loads correctly at the expected URL
